_meta.description: Data quality normalization rules for clinical trials data. Each rule maps one or more raw source values to a canonical display value within a named group. Used to deduplicate and group synonymous entries in charts and filters.

fields.group: Human-readable label for this canonical value
fields.raw_values: Exact source strings (case-sensitive) that map to this canonical value
fields.match_case_insensitive: If true, matching ignores case (default: false)
fields.notes: Optional explanation for why these are grouped

intervention.notes: All non-active control arms — editorial decision to group as 'Placebo' for chart deduplication
Baseline/control arms representing current standard treatment

status.notes: CT.gov uses both formats across eras

phase.notes: Combination phase trials stored inconsistently across submission eras
Combination phase trials stored inconsistently across submission eras
